name_cn:
【Top Grade Factory】
MCM Ella Visetos🆕New Arrival
Cognac Mini# Boston Bag
· Cp Exclusive®️ Full Cognac Visetos Print
This small Ella Boston bag was born during Munich's Golden Age and is a daily shoulder bag. The leather tag and engraved logo metal lock are inspired by the brand's travel tradition, directly drawn from the brand's classic suitcases.
Model: H083 Small
Size: 13.5*25*16cm
Strap: Removable/Adjustable 93-109cm
Zipper: Two-way full closure
Color: Cognac/Cognac 🟫
